body.title: PROC_FILTER habit — runs filter checklist, emits filter_result
body.result: Added pe_filter() to pe_chain.py — checks plan_defined, test_defined, not_high_inertia; hard-fail escalates on HIGH inertia files. Seeded PROC_FILTER habit memory. 7 tests.
body.description: Seed PROC_FILTER cognitive habit: runs filter checklist against basket.plan (scope ok? risk? test plan?), emits filter_result pass/fail into basket
